hero.label: Made for Respan
hero.headline: I want to be the first GTM hire who helps Respan win the AI agent layer.
hero.subheadline: Respan is solving a genuinely hard problem: observability breaks when agents start making compounding decisions, and the teams building those agents need a platform that thinks ahead of them. I come from cold outreach and B2B pipeline work, and I want to bring that same scrappiness to helping Andy and Raymond get Respan in front of every engineering team shipping agents. The rebrand from Keywords AI to Respan signals a company sharpening its thesis, and I want to be part of what comes next.

whyCompany.title: Respan is building the reliability layer the entire agent ecosystem needs
whyCompany.body: Logs and dashboards were built for single-turn LLMs, not for agents that chain decisions across time. Respan's bet that observability, evals, and the gateway need to live together in one self-driving platform is a strong one, especially as 60+ YC companies are already trusting it with production workloads. That kind of early traction in a technically sophisticated customer base tells me the product is real and the category is forming fast.

whyCompany.title: First GTM hire at a YC company right as the agent wave breaks open
whyCompany.body: Andy came from hardware at Apple and pivoted to building infrastructure for AI teams, which means the founding DNA is technical and product-led. Hiring a first GTM person now, with 60+ YC companies already using the platform, means the motion is there to be systematized, not invented from scratch. Getting in at this exact moment is the kind of opportunity that rarely comes twice.

whyCompany.title: My BDR and B2B marketing reps map directly onto what this role needs
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai I built cold outreach sequences in HubSpot and LinkedIn that helped close 15 to 20 paying clients from zero, so I know what it takes to move technically skeptical buyers through a pipeline. At NextAfter I got exposure to how B2B digital marketing actually converts attention into pipeline for a consultancy serving sophisticated clients. Selling a technical infrastructure product to AI engineering teams is a different conversation than most, and I have been building toward exactly that.

quote: Respan is what happens when the people building the AI agent layer finally get serious about not flying blind. I want to be the person who makes sure every team doing serious agent work knows Respan exists before anyone else does.
